The Recommendation

Join a weekly practice group

Take the next step in your formation by moving from hearing to doing. Community is the environment where spiritual growth becomes tangible.

Why this step?

Your journey at Movemental is unique. We've curated this next step based on your recent spiritual rhythms and active engagement.
